description_long: This object is a tall deciduous tree with a straight, dark brown trunk and a dense, irregularly shaped canopy. The foliage is composed of broad, flat leaves in varying shades of green, giving the tree a lush and healthy appearance. The branches extend outward and upward, creating a full, rounded crown with some asymmetry, especially when viewed from the sides. The trunk is relatively slender compared to the overall height and is free of visible roots at the base. The canopy is thick, with only small gaps between clusters of leaves, providing substantial shade. This tree would be commonly found lining urban streets, in parks, or as part of landscaped green spaces.
description: A tall, leafy deciduous tree with a dense, rounded canopy and a straight, dark trunk. Its broad green leaves and full crown make it ideal for urban parks or streets.
description_view_0: The tree appears tall and narrow, with a dense, vertically oriented canopy and a straight trunk visible at the base.
description_view_1: From this angle, the tree splits into two main clusters, revealing more of the branching structure and the separation between foliage masses.
description_view_2: The tree is seen with a fuller, more symmetrical canopy, and the trunk is clearly visible, supporting the dense foliage above.
description_view_3: This view shows the tree as two distinct leafy clusters, highlighting the spread and irregularity of the branches.
